description.value:
Requirements You're holding or adjacent to an unattended tech object.

You have learned how to adapt your thought patterns to that of a tech device and can merge with a tech object to understand what it knows. This allows you to learn what the computer knows as if you spent an hour scanning the computer or engaging it in a conversation using speak with computers. You can [[/act hack]] the computer to access protected systems without needing a hacking toolkit and can Hack using [[/act hack skill=diplomacy]]{Diplomacy} or [[/act hack skill=nature]]{Nature} instead of Computers. If the targeted object is an augmentation, you implant the augmentation.
